description.id: TukarSkill adalah platform buat saling tukar skill antar sesama. Dari ide, kami bantu bangun identitas brand dan MVP yang siap dicoba user pertama.
description.en: TukarSkill is a platform for exchanging skills among peers. From idea to launch, we help you build a brand identity and MVP ready for your first users.
description.tr: TukarSkill, bireyler arasında beceri alışverişi yapabileceğiniz bir platformdur. Fikirden başlayarak, marka kimliği ve ilk kullanıcılarınız için hazır MVP oluşturmanızda yardımcı oluyoruz.

note.id: Dikerjakan lewat proses 4 langkah Founderku — dari ngobrol ide sampai produk jalan.
note.en: Completed through Founderku's 4-step process, from idea discussion to a live product.
note.tr: Founderku'nun 4 adımlı süreci aracılığıyla tamamlandı, fikir tartışmasından canlı ürüne kadar.

linkLabel.en: View the finished product and details

description.id: Say Cheese adalah brand handcrafted cheesecake & chiffon cake made-to-order di Şişli, Istanbul. Kami bangun ulang website-nya dari Wix jadi custom website lengkap dengan animasi interaktif dan domain sendiri.
description.en: Say Cheese is a handcrafted cheesecake & chiffon cake made-to-order brand located in Şişli, Istanbul. We rebuilt their website from Wix into a complete custom website with interactive animations and their own domain.
description.tr: Say Cheese, Şişli, Istanbul'da yer alan, sipariş üzerine yapılan handcrafted cheesecake ve chiffon cake markasıdır. Web sitelerini Wix'ten, interaktif animasyonlar ve kendi domain'i içeren tam özel bir web sitesine yeniden tasarladık.

note.id: 4 halaman custom, animasi interaktif, dan setup domain dari nol sampai online.
note.en: 4 custom pages, interactive animations, and domain setup from zero to live.
note.tr: 4 özel sayfa, interaktif animasyonlar ve sıfırdan canlı yayına kadar domain kurulumu.

caseStudies.name: Kelasin
caseStudies.description: Kelasin adalah paket starter platform belajar skill harian, dua sisi: pembelajar yang butuh solusi cepat (servis motor, jahit, masak, dll) dan pengajar orang biasa yang punya skill tapi belum punya cara monetisasi. Beda dari platform kursus formal, kelas di sini pendek (15-30 menit), murah (mulai Rp 5.000), dan direkam pengajar langsung pake HP.
caseStudies.note: platform kelas mikro 15-30 menit buat skill harian, direkam pengajar biasa pake HP. desain sticky-note khas, katalog interaktif, alur pesan via whatsapp.

caseStudies.name: Motifa
caseStudies.description: Motifa merupakan website yang mengubah nama dan asal daerah pengunjung jadi motif personal bergaya nusantara, lalu dicetak on-demand ke kaos, totebag, atau mug.
caseStudies.note: motifa adalah paket ide bisnis lengkap: website yang mengubah nama dan asal daerah pengunjung jadi motif personal bergaya nusantara, lalu dicetak on-demand ke kaos, totebag, atau mug.

caseStudies.name: Lahirku
caseStudies.description: Generator kartu kelahiran bayi berbasis weton (tradisi Jawa). Orang tua tinggal isi nama dan tanggal lahir bayi, sistem otomatis hitung hari-pasaran, neptu, dan watak, lalu disusun jadi kartu kelahiran bergaya heirloom yang bisa dipajang atau dijadiin kado kelahiran. Bukan cuma kalkulator teks kayak situs weton lainnya.
caseStudies.note: Dikerjakan lewat proses 4 langkah Founderku — dari riset kompetitor sampai landing page + generator jadi.
